channel.title: Wazuh on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Wazuh on DevOpsTales

item.title: Send pfSense Logs to Wazuh
item.description: Centralizing pfSense firewall logs in Wazuh SIEM provides critical security visibility and threat detection capabilities. This updated guide for 2026 covers pfSense 2.7.x/2.8.x and Wazuh 4.8+ with proper syslog formatting and decoder configuration.

item.title: Wazuh SIEM Authentication
item.description: In this post I will show you how to configure LDAP Authentication in a Wazuh Open Source SIEM solution.

item.title: Install Wazuh SIEM
item.description: In this post I will show you how to install and configure the Wazuh Open Source SIEM solution.
